posts.author: d.taylor (dakota)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Make Dashboard Export Readable by Ai (Copilot) as the actual PDF files generated are non-readable by any OCR or AI system.

What are you trying to achieve

Hello. I am reaching out because I think a really useful feature would come into hand with exporting dashboards from monday.com. Although monday makes beautiful dashboards that can include graphs, tables, etc, the actual PDF files generated are non-readable by any OCR or AI system. So, when attempting to use copilot to generate PowerPoints, or even analyze multiple dashboards, it is not possible. If the dashboards had more export options, that would save so much time. Especially as we are using AI more than ever, it should be more compatible.
